features.title: Worksheets & Cells
features.description: Create workbooks with multiple sheets, typed cell values, formulas, and named ranges.

features.title: Tables & AutoFilter
features.description: Excel tables with AutoFilter, sorting, and automatic column sizing.

features.title: Charts
features.description: Column, pie, doughnut, scatter, bubble, and combo charts with formatting.

features.title: Conditional Formatting
features.description: Color scales, data bars, icon sets, and custom rules for visual data analysis.

features.title: Parallel Execution
features.description: Multi-threaded bulk operations for AutoFit, cell writes, and large datasets.

features.title: Validation
features.description: List, whole number, decimal, date, time, text length, and custom validation rules.
